english.seoDescription: Professional profile, trajectory, research, projects and technical writing by Raul Pacheco Rodriguez.
english.title: Research, systems and technical writing.
english.description: A compact view of what I build, what I research and how I connect electronics, software, efficient AI and technical communication.
english.occupation: Electronic engineer and efficient AI researcher

bodySections.heading: I build between software, electronics and applied research.
bodySections.text: I am an electronic engineer and frontend developer interested in AI systems that do more than work in a demo: they should be explainable, measurable and deployable under real constraints.

bodySections.heading: Efficient AI with evidence, not only demos.
bodySections.text: My current work focuses on hardware-aware machine learning, anti-leakage evaluation, quantization and reproducible workflows for demanding medical problems.

bodySections.heading: I like building maps, prototypes and systems that others can inspect.
bodySections.text: I work best when research, product and documentation meet: reading papers, turning them into experiments, designing interfaces to explore them and leaving a clear route for others to understand the technical decisions.

bodySections.heading: Resources for following the work map.
bodySections.text: I maintain a living library of readings, repositories, references and tools that feed my research and technical notes.

english.seoDescription: Research lines by Raul Pacheco Rodriguez in efficient AI, anti-leakage evaluation and algorithm-hardware co-design.
english.title: Efficient, reproducible and deployable AI.
english.description: I use demanding medical problems as a testbed for hardware-aware optimization, rigorous evaluation and tools that connect machine learning, quantization, RTL and verifiable systems.

cards.name: Efficient and hardware-aware AI
cards.description: Quantization, rotations, implementable primitives and algorithm-hardware co-design for more efficient AI models.

cards.name: Anti-leakage evaluation
cards.description: Methods, manifests and benchmarks for detecting temporal shortcuts and evaluating medical models with more rigor.

cards.name: Clinical-Core
cards.description: Modular architectures for reproducible, traceable medical research prepared for multimodal validation.

cards.name: FP32 and technical books
cards.description: An editorial lab for turning reading, research and technical practice into essays, books and learning resources.
